title: Level 717
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Level 717}}
''Description''
 {{Underline|FFFFFF}} '''Level 717''' is a presumably infinite Victorian-style church. The church passageways can range in size greatly, from large, tall domes to tight and uncomfortably claustrophobic passes. The hallways are arranged in a hexagonal pattern, which extends out to infinity. Stained glass windows typically found in churches can be found, however they are noticeably less vibrant and colorful than usual. The walls are made of an unidentified, dark gray stone, and are carved into intricate depictions of biblical scenes, separated by slate-like pillars. {{Blurimage|file=Joh.jpg|caption=One of the main halls.}} In larger chambers, there are rows upon rows of seats, and often times a stage. Occasionally a large chandelier will be suspended, however it cannot be turned on as it appears to have no electrical components. The floor is an abnormally smooth concrete, as if it was grounded down with sandpaper. Sounds of church bells ringing out and soft whispering can be occasionally heard echoing through the hallways, but the source of sound has yet to be identified. Other than sounds listed above, the level is dead silent. The level is locked in an eternal night, so light sources are necessary to explore the level. Temperatures are relatively bearable, ranging from 20 - 30 degrees Celsius, randomly fluctuating slowly. No entities are present within the level, however no food or other resources are present, so it is advised to leave the level as quickly as possible. In the sanctum, In the sanctum, In the sanctum, {{VoidedTheme}} {{CSS|content= .fandom-community-header__image img { opacity: 0; } .fandom-community-header__image:before { content: ""; background: url("https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/backrooms/images/1/12/Site-logo-binary.png/revision/latest?cb=20230624014747") no-repeat; width: 100px; height: 112px; background-size: 87px; position: absolute; transition: 0s; } }} {{Blurbackground|file=Lightless1.jpg}}
=
Throne for the King
= {{Underline|FFFFFF}}
Church bells and whispers. You stood. The tap of leather shoes on concrete. Walk. Walk more. Write down in your notes. ''“Level resembles a Victorian-style church, very dark'' The sound of church bells and whispers are very prevalent” This is what you’ve been sent to do. This is your duty. Keep walking. Keep writing. ''“Hallway design is very intricate”'' You’re doing well. You might be rewarded. Minutes. Hours. Days. You need to leave. Leave. Tired. So tired. You’ll be right back at it. Again. What are you working for? What are you working for? Sit still. Observe. … The center chamber. … A spotlight. A pile of mirror images. Just like you. Came before. A throne. Escape. An escape. You will be out of this nightmare. Look around you, look at where you’ve been, you’ve come so far. Come. Come to the throne. Join. A pile of laughing bodies. Laughing. Faces scrunched ear to ear. Hand in hand. Laughing. Smiling. Compulsion. Come sit. With us. Fourteen, fifteen steps. This throne is for you. Throne for the king. You deserve this. You’ve worked hard enough Out of this slog. The spotlight. Bright. Bright. Welcome. To paradise. Sit here. Don’t move. You’ll be back to the cycle. Close your eyes. You don’t need to care. You’ve made it to the air pocket In this cave. Flooded cave.
